name: obby-voice
description: Quick speech-to-text into a daily Inbox note via Whisper WASM, with mobile command.

scripts.build: node ./version-bump.mjs && esbuild 'src/main.ts' --bundle --minify --outfile=main.js --format=cjs --platform=browser --target=es2020 --external:obsidian --external:@xenova/transformers && esbuild node_modules/lamejs/lame.min.js --bundle --outfile=vendor/lamejs.js --format=iife --global-name=lamejs && cp node_modules/@xenova/transformers/dist/transformers.min.js vendor/ && mkdir -p vendor/wasm && cp node_modules/@xenova/transformers/dist/ort-wasm.wasm node_modules/@xenova/transformers/dist/ort-wasm-simd.wasm vendor/wasm/
scripts.local:patch: npm --no-git-tag-version version patch && npm run build && npm run deploy
scripts.local:minor: npm --no-git-tag-version version minor && npm run build && npm run deploy
scripts.local:major: npm --no-git-tag-version version major && npm run build && npm run deploy

author: octoshrimpy
